privileged_info_summary: No explicit metadata field in task.json. The task operates on a synthetic Odoo 17 ERP environment. Verified facts: (1) The event 'Product Roadmap Planning' exists and is created by setup_data.py with attendees Alice Johnson, David Chen, and Emma Thompson, with no initial location set. (2) The Odoo instance runs in Docker on port 8069 with a PostgreSQL database named 'odoo_scheduling'. (3) Default admin credentials are username 'admin' and password 'admin'. (4) Setup scripts confirm the calendar event is pre-created and location is cleared before task execution via setup_task.sh. (5) All data is synthetically generated during environment setup via setup_data.py, not sourced from external real-world data. (6) The task instructs the agent to set the location to 'Conference Room B', which is a task instruction not a data claim.
